The first AI agent built to run content operations at scale

Content Agent

Bulk edits, content audits, and gap analysis through conversation. What used to take days now takes minutes.

Try Content Agent Read the docs

Content Agent 101

Content Agent 101

Tell it what's wrong. Watch it fix everything.

Tell it what's wrong. Watch it fix everything.

Turn conversations into content operations

Turn conversations into content operations

  • Work at scale

    Analyze thousands of documents or update hundreds at once without engineering resources or custom scripts.

  • Save hours daily

    Turn tasks that take hours into seconds with AI that understands your content structure and relationships.

  • Bridge internal and external

    Combine your CMS knowledge with web research to identify gaps, trends, and opportunities automatically.

  • Empower editors

    Give content teams capabilities that previously required developer time and technical expertise.

“Content Agent feels like magic to our non-technical users. They can ask questions across our documentation, marketing site, and learning content without knowing where things live in the structure. It's democratized access to our content in ways we couldn't achieve before.”

Matt Chamberlain

Sr. Technical Product Manager, Braze

Five ways Content Agent works

Five ways Content Agent works

  • 1. Pipeline

    Press release to published article

  • 2. Analyst

    Scale beyond human limits

  • 3. Bulk editor

    Transform at scale

  • 4. Designer

    Describe it, see it

  • 5. Researcher

    Your content meets the world

  1. 1

    Transform source material into articles

    Transform press releases, briefs, or raw documents into articles with proper metadata, images, and alt text in a single conversation.

  2. 2

    Audit content health without queries

    Find documents missing fields, outdated content, or quality issues across. Surface gaps that would normally require engineering resources to uncover.

  3. 3

    Update hundreds of documents at once

    Bulk replace URLs, brand names, or text patterns across thousands of documents. Changes are validated and staged for review, so you stay in control.

  4. 4

    Edit visuals with natural language

    Adjust colors, compositions, or generate new images that match your brand without leaving your workflow.

  5. 5

    Connect your content to market trends

    Search the web, analyze industry developments, and identify gaps between what you've published and what's happening in your space.

“We have 650 franchise pages. For years, 'bulk update' meant our team and a spreadsheet. Content Agent finally made that phrase mean what it should—we describe the changes, review the results, done.”

Elizabeth Piñón

Director of Program Management

The first AI agent built to run content operations at scale

The first AI agent built to run content operations at scale

Writing assistants are everywhere.
Content Agent is something else entirely.

It understands your content structure.
It finds what needs fixing.
It makes the changes, hundreds at a time, and stages everything for your review.

This isn't AI bolted onto a CMS. It's AI that runs your content operations.

Read the launch post

“I asked Content Agent to review a promotion, and it immediately spotted that our legal dates didn’t match the start and end dates in the content. This is exactly what I need.”

Kenny Ashton

Senior Product Manager

How Content Agent works differently

How Content Agent works differently

Document sets and bulk operations

Create collections of documents, select within them, then apply changes across the entire set. Track progress and review results before committing.

Staged changes and releases

All edits are staged as proposed changes. Review in one place, adjust what to include, then release together.

Web research capabilities

Search the web, extract information from URLs, and synthesize external data with your content. Find trends, fact-check, and identify content gaps.

Schema-aware operations

Content Agent knows your document types, field requirements, and validation rules. Required fields are enforced, references stay intact, data types match your schema.

Multi-agent architecture

Specialized agents handle different operations. One for queries, another for edits, and one for images. Each task gets the right approach with appropriate safeguards.

Content Lake integration

Direct access to your content database. Query relationships, understand document history, and execute operations.

“Content Agent does an excellent job surfacing trending topics in our space and helping us identify coverage gaps. For a newsroom that needs to track what's happening across multiple platforms and determine if we've covered it, that analysis is instantly valuable. It's the kind of work I used to do manually every day.”

Joe Lautzenhiser

Product Manager @ CoinDesk
